title: Finding parking at the mall
story: I drove to the shopping mall on Saturday to pick up a birthday gift. The parking lot was full near the entrance, so I parked in the third row from the back. I walked to the store, found a wrapping paper set on the third aisle, purchased it for fifteen dollars, and returned to the car. The entire trip took about forty minutes.
notes: Routine errand, minor causal inference from parking choice
